en: Then Job answered and said:
zh: 約伯回答說：

en: "No doubt you are the people, and wisdom will die with you.
zh: “你們真的是有知識的民， 你們死了，智慧也跟你們一同滅亡。

en: But I have understanding as well as you; I am not inferior to you. Who does not know such things as these?
zh: 但我也有聰明像你們一樣， 我並非不及你們， 像你們所說的這些事，有誰不曉得呢？

en: I am a laughingstock to my friends; I, who called to God and he answered me, a just and blameless man, am a laughingstock.
zh: 我這求告 神，又蒙他應允的， 竟成為朋友的笑柄， 公義完全的人竟成為笑柄，

en: In the thought of one who is at ease there is contempt for misfortune; it is ready for those whose feet slip.
zh: 平靜的人心中藐視災禍， 作將滑跌者的分。

en: The tents of robbers are at peace, and those who provoke God are secure, who bring their god in their hand.
zh: 強盜的帳幕興旺， 惹 神發怒的安穩， 神的手賞賜他們。

en: "But ask the beasts, and they will teach you; the birds of the heavens, and they will tell you;
zh: 你且問走獸，走獸必指教你， 又問空中的飛鳥，飛鳥必告訴你；

en: or the bushes of the earth, and they will teach you; and the fish of the sea will declare to you.
zh: 或向地說話，地必指教你， 海中的魚也必向你說明。

en: Who among all these does not know that the hand of the LORD has done this?
zh: 從這一切看來，誰不知道， 是耶和華的手作成這事的呢？

en: In his hand is the life of every living thing and the breath of all mankind.
zh: 活物的生命與全人類的氣息， 都在耶和華的手中。

en: Does not the ear test words as the palate tastes food?
zh: 耳朵不是試驗說話， 好像上膛嘗試食物嗎？

en: Wisdom is with the aged, and understanding in length of days.
zh: 你們說：老年的有智慧， 長壽的有聰明。

en: "With God are wisdom and might; he has counsel and understanding.
zh: 他有智慧與能力， 又有謀略與聰明。

en: If he tears down, none can rebuild; if he shuts a man in, none can open.
zh: 他所拆毀的，就不能重建， 他所囚禁的，就不能釋放。

en: If he withholds the waters, they dry up; if he sends them out, they overwhelm the land.
zh: 他若把水阻截，水就乾涸， 他再把水放出，水就使地翻倒。

en: With him are strength and sound wisdom; the deceived and the deceiver are his.
zh: 他有大能與智謀， 受騙的與騙人的，都是屬他的。

en: He leads counselors away stripped, and judges he makes fools.
zh: 他把謀士剝衣擄去， 並且愚弄審判官。

en: He looses the bonds of kings and binds a waistcloth on their hips.
zh: 他解開了君王綁人的繩索， 又用腰布捆綁君王的腰。

en: He leads priests away stripped and overthrows the mighty.
zh: 他把祭司剝衣擄去， 傾覆有權有勢的人。

en: He deprives of speech those who are trusted and takes away the discernment of the elders.
zh: 他除掉忠信人的言論， 又除去老年人的辨別力。

en: He pours contempt on princes and loosens the belt of the strong.
zh: 他把羞辱傾倒在王子上， 又鬆開壯士的腰帶。

en: He uncovers the deeps out of darkness and brings deep darkness to light.
zh: 他從黑暗中彰顯奧祕， 把死蔭領進光中。

en: He makes nations great, and he destroys them; he enlarges nations, and leads them away.
zh: 他使邦國興盛，又毀滅他們， 擴張邦國，又把他們擄去。

en: He takes away understanding from the chiefs of the people of the earth and makes them wander in a pathless waste.
zh: 他除掉地上人民中首領的悟性， 使他們在無路的荒野之地飄流。

en: They grope in the dark without light, and he makes them stagger like a drunken man.
zh: 他們在黑暗無光中摸索， 他使他們飄泊無定像醉漢一樣。”
